channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. Military Strikes Suspected Drug Boat in Eastern Pacific, Killing 2
item.description: The U.S. military said it struck another vessel suspected of transporting drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean, killing two men, the day after it said a...

item.title: Two hikers describe their close call with grizzly bears
item.description: ABC News' Danny New interviews two Glacier National Park hikers who now find humor in their grizzly bear encounter.

item.title: Australia sues 3M for $1.4 billion over 'forever chemicals' at defense sites
item.description: Australia has filed a lawsuit against 3M seeking over 2 billion Australian dollars for contamination from firefighting foam containing persistent chemicals.

item.title: Fire at Kenyan girls' school kills at least 16 students, injures many
item.description: A fire at a central Kenya girls' school has resulted in an unknown number of deaths, with search teams deployed, police reported.
